content: Cannot login after the latest update. Password reset email never arrives.
Billing page crashes when I try to download last month's invoice in Firefox.
Support was super helpful — resolved our SSO issue in under an hour. Thank you!
Dashboard loads very slowly when we have more than 500 feedback records.
How do I invite teammates with Analyst role? The settings page is confusing.
CSV export is missing the sentiment score column. Please add it back.
We were charged twice this month and cannot find a refund option.
Love the new theme clustering — tagged our backlog accurately on first run.
Mobile app crashes when opening the feedback inbox on iOS 18.
Notifications are too noisy. Need more granular mute options per channel.
Security concern: received another customer's notification with their data.
Integration with Slack works perfectly. Saved hours of manual reporting.
Search returns irrelevant results half the time for theme names.
Onboarding took forever — couldn't figure out how to connect our data sources.
Your API docs are excellent. Integration with our internal tools was straightforward.
The charts don't update in real time. We have to refresh constantly.
Cannot change subscription plan from monthly to annual without contacting support.
Dark mode is fantastic — much easier on the eyes during late-night analysis.
Export to PDF breaks table formatting on multi-page reports.
Role-based access control is perfect for our team structure. Great job.
We're blocked without SSO — enterprise prospect refuses to proceed without it.
Weekly digest email is exactly what leadership needs. Very well formatted.
Theme detection tagged a billing complaint as UI/UX. Accuracy needs work.
Data isn't syncing properly between web and mobile apps overnight.
Response time from support has improved a lot this quarter. Keep it up!
